title: justicia boaleri
intro: Justicia boaleri, also known as Boaler's Justicia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia boaleri include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Justicia boaleri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
